---
name: New language request (classic)
about: Request or propose a new language bundle for BoatRacing
title: "[Language] "
labels: i18n, enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Language name
- Example: Dutch

## Language code
- Use the code for messages_<code>.yml (example: nl, sv, cs, uk)

## Request type
- [ ] I only request this language
- [ ] I can provide a full translation
- [ ] I can help review an existing draft

## Why this language should be added
Community/server context, user demand, etc.

## Translation status (if you can contribute)
Do you already have a draft? Can you translate from English?

## Contributor checklist
- [ ] I can keep placeholders unchanged (for example {player}, {track}, {laps}).
- [ ] I can preserve color/style formatting (& color codes, symbols, punctuation style).
- [ ] I can review race/setup/gui/admin keys to avoid missing entries.

## Optional sample translation
```yaml
# Paste 3-10 example keys
```

## Additional notes
Any locale conventions (formal tone, script variants, etc.).
